--- Gem Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 64/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/5 targets affected.
